title: 10 best herbal teas for dehydration
description: Wild marjoram teas helps with dehydration because of its potent diuretic properties, which stimulate the body to release excess fluids and electrolytes. The tea's antioxidants also help to neutralize toxins that can contribute to dehydration, such as oxidative stress and inflammation. Furthermore, wild marjoram's natural cooling effects can help to reduce fever and ease heat-related discomfort, making it an effective remedy for dehydration caused by hot weather or excessive exercise....
